title: Inflation Fears Drive Consumer Sentiment to Record Low
title_cn: 通胀担忧导致消费者信心创历史新低
summary: The University of Michigan’s final April sentiment index dropped to 49.8 this month from 53.3 in March. While that was slightly improved from the preliminary reading, it remained the lowest in data back to 1978. Mike McKee reports on "Bloomberg Open Interest." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: China's DeepSeek Unveils AI Model To Challenge Anthropic, OpenAI | The Pulse 4/24
title_cn: 中国DeepSeek推出AI模型挑战Anthropic、OpenAI |脉搏 4/24
summary:
"The Pulse With Francine Lacqua" is all about conversations with high profile guests in the beating heart of global business, economics, finance and politics. Based in London, we go wherever the story is, bringing you exclusive interviews and market-moving scoops.

Today's guests:
Wei Li, BlackRock, Global Chief Investment Strategist; Clemens Fuest, Ifo Institute, President; Clément Therme, International Institute for Iranian Studies, Non-Resident Fellow; Francesca Ghiretti, RAND, Europe China Initiative Director.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: The Breakup That Wasn’t: Live Nation Keeps Ticketmaster
title_cn: 并非分手：Live Nation 保留 Ticketmaster
summary:
Live Nation and Ticketmaster’s anti-monopoly trial has surfaced some shocking emails, where employees called customers "stupid" and bragged about "robbing them blind" with fees and extra charges on things like parking and lawn chair rentals.

Bloomberg's Ashley Carman joins Max Chafkin and Stacey Vanek Smith to discuss Live Nation's settlement with the DOJ and what it means for the cost of concert tickets. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Intel Shares Eclipse Dot-Com Peak After Strong Sales Forecast

summary: Norway plans to restrict access to social media for children under 16, joining a growing number of countries responding to concerns about the potential harm kids face online.

title: Meta Inks Deal to Use Amazon’s Graviton Processors for AI
title_cn: Meta Inks 达成协议，将使用亚马逊的 Graviton 处理器进行人工智能
summary: Amazon.com Inc. and Meta Platforms Inc. have struck a multibillion-dollar deal for the social-media giant to rent hundreds of thousands of Amazon’s general-purpose chips for its AI efforts.

title: Trump's Social Message Blitz Hurts Iran Talks Say Officials
title_cn: 官员称特朗普的社交信息闪电战损害了伊朗谈判
summary: The prospect of Iran agreeing to more in-person peace talks with the US is being hindered by President Donald Trump's threats and brash social media posts, according to several officials with knowledge of the diplomatic efforts to end their war. Trump's Truth Social posts — as well as his decision to continue with a naval blockade of Iranian ports — have been detrimental to ongoing negotiations through mediators such as Pakistan, according to two US officials familiar with the matter. Our EMEA News Director Will Kennedy joins Stephen Carroll and Caroline Hepker to discuss. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SAP CFO: We Want to Lead Market Rather Than Follow
title_cn: SAP CFO：我们希望引领市场而不是跟随
summary: SAP reported stronger-than-expected first-quarter revenue growth in its cloud division, beating analyst estimates. The results come as Europe's largest software company ramps up the integration of artificial intelligence agents across its platform. SAP CFO Dominik Asam joined Bloomberg's Opening Trade.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SLB to Acquire S&P Global’s Subsurface Oil Software Business

summary: Citadel Securities is seeing strong returns from ramping up investment in AI as the soaring cost of GPUs and infrastructure is raising barriers for new competitors. Jim Esposito, President of Citadel Securities speaks in a wide-ranging interview at the Bloomberg Markets and Banking Summit in New York on April 22nd, 2026 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Lidl Billionaire Backs Cohere’s Plan to Buy German AI Champion

summary: Artificial intelligence developer Cohere Inc. has agreed to buy Aleph Alpha, a startup once considered Germany’s national AI champion, in a deal that includes a $600 million investment from German retailer Schwarz Group.

title: The Hottest Phone for Kids Right Now Is a $100 Landline
title_cn: 目前最热门的儿童手机是 100 美元的固定电话
summary: The Tin Can has gone viral over the past year, mostly through word of mouth. Now schools want to get even more of them in students' homes.

title: Data Centers Are Finding a Surprising Way to Deploy Batteries
title_cn: 数据中心正在寻找一种令人惊讶的电池部署方式
summary: By pairing energy storage with natural gas, hyperscalers are able to get power faster and do so behind the meter.

title: Revolut Winds Down Commodities Service in Some European Markets
title_cn: Revolut 终止部分欧洲市场的商品服务
summary: Revolut Ltd. is shuttering its commodities business for trading precious metals in parts of Europe.

title: MS NOW Looks to Be a More Social Network With New App
title_cn: MS NOW 借助新应用打造更具社交性的网络
summary: MS NOW, the media network formerly called MSNBC, is using Saturday’s White House Correspondents’ Dinner as an opportunity to debut its new rebrand in Washington.The network is hosting a brunch for student journalists and on-air talent on Friday. Then, following the Saturday dinner, MS NOW has invited Washington insiders to what’s being billed as a “subversive” underground after party at a former trolley car station nearby.

title: Altman Versus Musk: How the Biggest Feud In Tech Landed in Court
title_cn: 奥特曼与马斯克：科技界最大的恩怨如何告上法庭
summary: The OpenAI CEO fell out with the world’s richest person years ago. Now Musk is trying to thwart Altman’s plans for the leading AI platform.

title: China Seeks Closer Thai, Cambodia Ties While Warning on Scams
title_cn: 中国寻求加强泰国和柬埔寨关系，同时警告诈骗
summary: China’s top envoy Wang Yi signaled Beijing’s concerns about online scams emanating from Southeast Asia as he visited Thailand and Cambodia in a bid to boost links with both nations.

title: China to Curb US Investment in Tech Companies After Meta Deal
title_cn: 元交易后中国将限制美国对科技公司的投资
summary: Chinese regulators plan to restrict technology firms including some of the country’s highest-profile AI pioneers from accepting US capital without government approval, part of Beijing’s broader response to Meta Platforms Inc.’s controversial acquisition of startup Manus.

title: BlackRock Likes Chips, Hardware in Overweight AI Stance
title_cn: 贝莱德看好芯片和硬件，加大人工智能立场
summary: Wei Li, chief global investment strategist at BlackRock, discusses the outlook for artificial intelligence stocks, capital expenditure and earnings. "We're specifically overweight semis and hardware," Li tells Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SAP Reports Cloud Growth That Beats Estimates in AI Push
title_cn: SAP 报告人工智能推动云增长超出预期
summary: SAP SE reported revenue growth from its cloud services that beat analysts’ estimates after Europe’s biggest software company began integrating artificial intelligence agents into the service.

title: China’s Carmakers Grab 30% of Europe’s Plug-In Hybrid Sales
title_cn: 中国汽车制造商占据欧洲插电式混合动力车销量的30%
summary: Chinese automakers made strong inroads into Europe last month as consumers rushed to buy more affordable plug-in hybrids from brands led by BYD Co.

title: Lightelligence Is Said Set to Price HK IPO at Top of Range
title_cn: 据称 Lightelligence 将香港 IPO 定价定为区间顶部
summary: Chinese optical-computing company Lightelligence is poised to price its oversubscribed Hong Kong initial public offering at the top of the marketed range, according to people familiar with the matter, signaling hot demand for components used in the artificial-intelligence buildout.

title: Philippines Looks to Follow Australia's Social Media Ban
title_cn: 菲律宾希望效仿澳大利亚的社交媒体禁令
summary: Philippine Senator Win Gatchalian discusses his push to enact social media policies similar to those in Australia, in an effort to protect minors from excessive use and mental health harm. He speaks with Shery Ahn on “Bloomberg Tech: Asia.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Should Social Media Be Regulated Like Cigarettes?
title_cn: 社交媒体是否应该像香烟一样受到监管？
summary: Ravi Iyer, Managing Director at USC Marshall School Neely Center, discusses the sociological impact of social media addiction on young people. He says millions of kids in the US are already seeing negative impact to their health, and existing safeguards are not enough. He speaks with Shery Ahn on “Bloomberg Tech: Asia.”  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: TSMC Shares Surge as Taiwan Lifts Single-Stock Limit for Funds
title_cn: 台湾取消基金单股限制 台积电股价飙升
summary: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co. shares climbed to a record after Taiwan’s financial regulator eased limits on single-stock fund holdings, a move that JPMorgan Chase & Co. said could draw more than $6 billion of inflows.

title: Victory Giant Founder on $2.6B HK Listing, AI
title_cn: Victory Giant 创始人在 $2.6B 香港上市，AI
summary: Victory Giant Technology Huizhou Co. surged in its Hong Kong trading debut on Tuesday, after raising $2.6 billion. Ahead of the company’s listing, founder Chen Tao told Bloomberg that the printed circuit board maker expects “high-speed growth” over the next five years.

title: Limiting Oil Exports Would Be a Mistake, McNally Says
title_cn: 麦克纳利表示，限制石油出口将是一个错误
summary: President Donald Trump is making it easier to move oil, fuel and fertilizer around the US by extending a 90-day shipping waiver. Robert McNally, Rapidan Energy Group founder, says the move could help "on the margins." He speaks on "Bloomberg Surveillance." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Romanian President on Europe-US Relations, Iran War Impact
title_cn: 罗马尼亚总统谈欧美关系、伊朗战争影响
summary: Romanian President Nicușor Dan tells Bloomberg’s Oliver Crook that Bucharest backs the NATO transatlantic alliance, as he highlights US-Romanian economic ties with the country aiming to boost domestic natural gas production. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: DOJ Drops Powell Probe, Smoothing Path for Warsh to Lead Fed
title_cn: 美国司法部放弃鲍威尔调查，为沃什领导美联储铺平道路
summary: The Justice Department is ending a controversial investigation into building-renovation cost overruns by the Federal Reserve, potentially clearing a path to confirmation for Kevin Warsh, President Donald Trump’s pick to be the next Fed leader.

title: Romania President Defends Europe’s ‘Pragmatic’ Hormuz Stance
title_cn: 罗马尼亚总统捍卫欧洲“务实”霍尔木兹立场
summary: Romania’s President Nicusor Dan said the “pragmatic” approach taken by a European coalition boosts the chances of Iran reopening the strait of Hormuz, as the Middle East crisis pushes energy prices up across the continent.

title: Trump Says He Won't Be Rushed to End Iran War
title_cn: 特朗普表示他不会急于结束伊朗战争
summary: President Donald Trump said he won't be rushed to end the war in Iran and pushed back on questions that the conflict is exceeding the four-to-six week timeline that he and advisers previously set for the war. He spoke Thursday in the Oval Office.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: EU Is Drafting Plans to Defend Its Borders as US Support Wavers
title_cn: 随着美国支持动摇，欧盟正在起草保卫边界的计划
summary: The European Union is drawing up plans to help countries fight off a military assault with or without its superpower ally, the US.

title: Russia and Ukraine Exchange 193 Prisoners Each in Latest Swap
title_cn: 俄罗斯和乌克兰最新交换囚犯各 193 名
summary: Russia and Ukraine exchanged prisoners of war on Friday, swapping 193 from each side, the two countries said.

title: Trump Says Putin G-20 Visit Would ‘Probably Be Very Helpful’
title_cn: 特朗普称普京二十国集团访问“可能非常有帮助”
summary: US President Donald Trump said he didn’t expect Vladimir Putin to attend the Group of 20 meeting at his resort in Doral, Florida, later this year, but said the Russian leader’s participation could be useful.

title: Iran Chief Diplomat to Visit Pakistan as Trump Talks Up Blockade
title_cn: 特朗普谈论封锁之际，伊朗首席外交官将访问巴基斯坦
summary: Iran’s foreign minister is expected to arrive in Pakistan, the main mediator between Tehran and Washington, though it was unclear if he’d meet American officials.

title: Hegseth Accuses Europe, Asia of ‘Freeriding’ Over Hormuz
title_cn: 赫格斯指责欧洲和亚洲在霍尔木兹海峡上“搭便车”
summary: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth accused European and Asian countries of relying on the US military to reopen the vital Strait of Hormuz after it was closed by the war against Iran.

title: Hegseth Tells Europe the Time for Freeriding Is Over
title_cn: 赫格斯告诉欧洲搭便车的时代已经结束
summary: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth criticized European and Asian countries for relying on the US military to reopen the Strait of Hormuz. He said at a Pentagon briefing Friday morning that the Navy blockade is growing and going global. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Hungary’s Magyar Taps Blind Minister in Diverse Cabinet Drive
title_cn: 匈牙利马扎尔在多元化内阁活动中任命盲人部长
summary: Hungary’s incoming Prime Minister Peter Magyar is planning to replace Viktor Orban’s all-male cabinet with a more diverse team of top officials as he looks to make a clean break with his country’s illiberal past.

title: Meloni Hasn’t Spoken to Trump, But Says US Ties Are ‘Solid’
title_cn: 梅洛尼尚未与特朗普交谈，但表示美国关系“牢固”
summary: Italian Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni said she’s had no recent contact with President Donald Trump, though relations with the US were “still solid.”

title: Iran Foreign Minister to Visit Islamabad Friday, Pakistan Says
title_cn: 巴基斯坦称伊朗外长将于周五访问伊斯兰堡
summary: Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi is expected to arrive in Pakistan’s capital on Friday night for a possible second round of peace talks with the US, according to officials in Islamabad familiar with the matter.

title: Netanyahu Says He Had Successful Prostate Cancer Treatment
title_cn: 内塔尼亚胡称他的前列腺癌治疗取得了成功
summary: Israel’s Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu said he recently had successful treatment for cancer and is “in excellent physical condition.”

title: Citadel Sends Warning Shot to NYC After Mamdani Blasts Billionaire Griffin
title_cn: 马姆达尼爆炸亿万富翁格里芬后，Citadel 向纽约市发出警告
summary: Just two months ago, Vornado Realty Trust was boasting about financial behemoth Citadel’s appetite for New York real estate, vowing to create a new icon for the Manhattan skyline.

title: Trump’s Weaker Footing Ahead of China Trip, and His Nerd Prom Return
title_cn: 特朗普在中国之行前的立场较弱，以及他的书呆子舞会回归
summary: China has gained from Trump’s stumbles

title: UK Insists Sovereignty of Falklands Is Unchanged After US Threat
title_cn: 英国坚称福克兰群岛的主权在美国威胁后没有改变
summary: The UK has insisted it will retain sovereignty of the Falklands Islands, after a leaked Pentagon email suggested the US would review the territory’s position as punishment for Britain’s lack of support on the war in Iran.

title: EU Chief Warns Leaders Bloc Will Lose Way by Following Trump
title_cn: 欧盟主席警告欧盟领导人如果追随特朗普将会迷失方向
summary: European Council President Antonio Costa warned EU leaders that the bloc will be lost if it outsources key decisions to US President Donald Trump.

title: White House Extends Shipping Waiver to August to Ease Oil Crunch
title_cn: 白宫将航运豁免延长至八月以缓解石油紧缩
summary: President Donald Trump’s administration has given a 90-day extension to a shipping waiver making it easier to move oil, fuel and fertilizer around the US, marking the latest effort by the White House to counter supply disruptions tied to the Iran war.

title: Richer European Countries Question Multi-Trillion Budget Talks
title_cn: 富裕的欧洲国家质疑数万亿预算谈判
summary: Tensions over the European Union’s next long-term budget surfaced in negotiations among member states, with the bloc’s richer members insisting that their contributions to the common budget be reduced.

title: Iran Keeps Loading Oil Onto Tankers Even as US Blocks Exit Route
title_cn: 尽管美国封锁出口路线，伊朗仍继续向油轮装载石油
summary: Iran is continuing to load millions of barrels of oil onto supertankers, an activity that will only become increasingly difficult if the US keeps up a blockade on Tehran’s shipping.

title: Petro Speeds $7 Billion Pension Transfers, Risking Market Shock
title_cn: Petro 冒着市场冲击的风险加速 70 亿美元养老金转移
summary: Colombia’s government is pressing ahead with a plan to transfer about $7 billion from private pension savings into the public retirement system, a move that risks destabilizing local markets as funds may be forced to rapidly liquidate assets to comply.

title: Merz and Macron Seek Face-Saving Resolution on Jet Program
title_cn: 梅尔茨和马克龙就喷气式飞机项目寻求保全面子的解决方案
summary: Germany and France sought to salvage a joint fighter-jet project that’s been beleaguered by cross-border divisions and persistent delays.

title: China Set to Send Pandas to US Before Trump’s Planned Visit
title_cn: 中国将在特朗普访问美国之前向美国派遣大熊猫
summary: China is sending two pandas to the US, adding to signs of stabilizing ties between the nations just before President Donald Trump’s planned meeting with Xi Jinping in mid-May.

title: Sheinbaum Can’t Escape Mexico’s Security Dilemma
title_cn: 谢因鲍姆无法摆脱墨西哥的安全困境
summary: The president has had a run of recent setbacks,  with security lapses chief among them.

title: Malaysia’s Anwar Eyes Polls by October as Subsidy Cut Looms
title_cn: 补贴削减迫在眉睫，马来西亚安瓦尔预计十月进行民意调查
summary: Malaysian Prime Minister Anwar Ibrahim is considering calling for a general election in the third quarter as his government weighs politically sensitive cuts to fuel subsidies amid the global energy crunch, according to people with knowledge of the matter.
